en: Oh my God, did you guys hear there's a new variant?
ko: 세상에, 얘들아 새 변이가 나왔다는 거 들었어?

en: Are you kidding me? Oh my God, another one? When is COVID going to be over?
This is ridiculous. Wait, wait, wait. Apparently this one is good.
ko: 말도 안 돼. 잠깐, 잠깐, 잠깐.

en: What do you mean it's good? I don't know. Let me just turn on the news.
They're calling it a miracle, a new strain of COVID-19 that's mutated so hard, it's
ko: 기적이라고 부르고 있습니다. 코로나-19의 새로운 변이가 너무 심하게 변이되어서

en: actually good. Wait, no.
It's called the Galvini variant and it doesn't make you sick, it just makes you feel dope.
ko: Galvini 변이라고 불리는데, 아프게 하는 게 아니라 그냥 기분을 좋게 만들어준대.

en: Oh my God. What? Dude, it like doesn't give you a fever or anything?
ko: 세상에. 뭐? 야, 열도 안 나고 아무것도 없는 거야?

en: No, it just makes you feel like cool and confident.
ko: 아니, 그냥 멋있고 자신감 넘치는 기분이 들게 해줘.

en: It comes from the sandy beaches of Cabo San Lucas.
ko: 그건 카보 산 루카스의 모래 해변에서 왔어.

en: Dude, having Galvini is like having a drink with an old friend. Bear me.
ko: 야, Galvini에 걸리면 옛 친구랑 술 한잔하는 기분이래.

en: Oh my God, Fauci's telling people to go to the club.
ko: 말도 안 돼. 세상에, Fauci가 클럽 가라고 하고 있어.

en: Oh, we have to get it. Yo. Hey guys.
Hey Paul. Bad news.
ko: 야 얘들아. 야 Paul. 안 좋은 소식.

en: I tested positive for the Galvini variant and it actually made me sick.
ko: Galvini 변이 양성 나왔는데, 진짜로 아프게 만들었어.

en: Oh no. I plan sin.
Oh my God. Oh.
You're positive. You're positive.
You're positive. You're positive. You're positive.
It's just in. I'm going on vacay.
See you in Bali, bitches. All right.
Who's hungry? Did somebody say hungry?
Brokers. Come and get it.
ko: 브로커스, 와서 먹어. 브로커스가 풀려났다. 야, 야, 야.

en: Chug, chug, chug, chug. Brokers on the loose.
ko: 브로커스, 와서 먹어. 브로커스가 풀려났다. 야, 야, 야.

en: Yo, yo, yo.
Fauci just put out a statement. What'd he say? He just hooked up with Saweetie.
Go Fauci. Go Fauci. Go Saweetie.
ko: 가자 파우치, 가자 파우치, 가자 사위티.

en: Go Saweetie. Martin, you're positive. I know, right?
No, for anal worms. For real?
But we caught it early.
Hold up. A new symptom.
ko: 잠깐. 새로운 증상이래. 좋은 변이가 풍성하고 윤기나는 머리카락을 준대.

en: Apparently the good variant gives you long, luscious locks.
ko: 잠깐. 새로운 증상이래. 좋은 변이가 풍성하고 윤기나는 머리카락을 준대.

en: Yeah, I couldn't do this before. 40 hands.
Oh boy. And guess what else, y'all? What else, newsman?
Pokemon are real. Oh my God.
Look at this. We're going to live forever.
Did someone say hungry?
Maybe a while ago, but yeah, come on in, man. Newsman.
ko: 좀 전에 했는데, 그래 들어와. 앵커맨! Paul 화이팅!

en: Go Paul. Go Paul. Go Paul. This kicks ass.
COVID's over and everything's going to rock forever. Oh man.
This just in. Pokemon have stormed the Capitol.
I repeat, Pokemon have stormed the Capitol. Oh my God.
Oh wait. Oh hold up, y'all. They're just there to pass awesome legislation.
ko: 그냥 좋은 소식 전하러 온 거래.
